title: trochera calycina
intro: Trochera calycina, also known as Yellow Bird's Eye, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Rubiaceae family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Trochera calycina include its ability to treat fever, respiratory problems, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and antimicrobial agent. Trochera calycina can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and flowers are often used in herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
